description: Post-Phase-5C synthetic-checker retirement baseline — build surface (generateSchemasFromProgram, direct Stripe types, no Ref<T> wrapper)

gate.note: §8.4b target is peakRSS_MB ≤ 700 MB. Phase 5C result is 769.5 MB — a 91.8 MB (10.7%) improvement over the Phase 0 baseline of 861.3 MB, but 69.5 MB above the gate. Remaining headroom likely lives in host-program caching and type-checker warmup costs. Tracked as a follow-up; not a blocker for synthetic-checker retirement.
